description: Terms describing an object's role within a nesting relationship, distinct from its size. This is a starting vocabulary — new role terms should be added here as design system patterns are identified.

values.label: Container
values.description: The outer, container-level object in a nesting relationship (e.g. an action button or picker)

values.label: Control
values.description: The inner, nested control object in a nesting relationship (e.g. a checkbox's control box), sized smaller than its container to create a visually balanced gap
